title: Novor Asteroid Field
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Novor Asteroid Field''' was the remnants of the destroyed seventeen innermost planets of the [[Novor system/Legends|Novor system]], blasted by the expansion of their star, [[Novor Major]].

{{Loc-stub}}
